'''竏嘛-r-ng-r''' ('''kavarngeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machiavellise|machiavellise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machiavellise|machiavellise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘛-r-ng-r
|-
! Lemma
| kavarngeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thivarngeroko || jivarngeroko || shivarngeroko || kivarngeroko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuvarngeroko || jujuvarngeroko || shushuvarngeroko || kukuvarngeroko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuvarngeroko || juvarngeroko || shuvarngeroko || kuvarngeroko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuvarngeroko || juvarngeroko || shuvarngeroko || kuvarngeroko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thevarngeroko || jevarngeroko || shevarngeroko || kevarngeroko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothovarngeroko || jojovarngeroko || shoshovarngeroko || kokovarngeroko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thovarngeroko || jovarngeroko || shovarngeroko || kovarngeroko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thovarngeroko || jovarngeroko || shovarngeroko || kovarngeroko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || varngeroko || varngeroko || varngeroko || varngeroko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || varngeroko || varngeroko || varngeroko || varngeroko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || varngeroko || varngeroko || varngeroko || varngeroko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || varngeroko || varngeroko || varngeroko || varngeroko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thﾃｦvarngeroko || jﾃｦvarngeroko || shﾃｦvarngeroko || kﾃｦvarngeroko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathavarngeroko || jajavarngeroko || shashavarngeroko || kakavarngeroko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thavarngeroko || javarngeroko || shavarngeroko || kavarngeroko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thavarngeroko || javarngeroko || shavarngeroko || kavarngeroko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shavarngerithi || shavarngeriji || shavarngerishi || shavarngeriki
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || shavarngeruthu || shavarngeruju || shavarngerushu || shavarngeruku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || shavarngeruthuf || shavarngerujuf || shavarngerushuf || shavarngerukuf
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || shavarngerotho || shavarngerojo || shavarngerosho || shavarngeroko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || shavarngerotho || shavarngerojo || shavarngerosho || shavarngeroko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || shavarngerothof || shavarngerojof || shavarngeroshof || shavarngerokof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shavarngerﾃｯf || shavarngerﾃｯf || shavarngerﾃｯf || shavarngerﾃｯf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shavarngerﾃｯf || shavarngerﾃｯf || shavarngerﾃｯf || shavarngerﾃｯf
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shavarngerﾃｯf || shavarngerﾃｯf || shavarngerﾃｯf || shavarngerﾃｯf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || shavarngerﾃｦthﾃｦ || shavarngerﾃｦjﾃｦ || shavarngerﾃｦshﾃｦ || shavarngerﾃｦkﾃｦ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || shavarngeratha || shavarngeraja || shavarngerasha || shavarngeraka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || shavarngeratha || shavarngeraja || shavarngerasha || shavarngeraka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || shavarngerathaf || shavarngerajaf || shavarngerashaf || shavarngerakaf
|}
